_instructions: This file holds ALL the editable text on the KhanConcepts website. Each top-level key below is one section of the site — the '_section' note inside it tells you where that section appears. Only edit the plain text values; do not rename or remove any keys. Wrapping a phrase in **double asterisks** (e.g. **like this**) makes it show in gold on the site.

seo._section: Controls what shows up in Google search results and in link previews when a page is shared on social media, WhatsApp, iMessage, etc. 'title' is the browser tab title / search result heading, 'description' is the snippet shown below it, and 'image' is the preview picture shown when the link is shared. Leave any page's title/description/image blank to fall back to 'defaultTitle'/'defaultDescription'/'defaultImage' below. 'siteName' is appended after every page's title. 'domain' and 'logo' are used for the Organization schema search engines read to understand the business — leave 'domain' as the live production domain. 'social' is the ONE place to update social profile links on the entire site — it feeds both the footer's social icons and the schema search engines read; leave any entry blank until that profile exists, a blank one is simply omitted everywhere. 'keywords' per page are the target search phrases for that page; they're placed in a meta tag (a minor, mostly-ignored ranking signal) — the real SEO value comes from these same phrases appearing in the page's visible headings and paragraphs elsewhere in this file.
seo.defaultTitle: KhanConcepts — I Innovate Concepts That Redefine Industries
seo.defaultDescription: I innovate concepts that redefine industries and create better solutions across every industry, from product to hardware to technology.

home.title: KhanConcepts
home.description: KhanConcepts researches real-world problems and creates innovative Concept Designs that help companies discover better solutions before investing time and resources in bringing them to life.

concepts.title: KhanConcepts - Concepts
concepts.description: Explore innovative Concept Designs across multiple industries, each focused on researching real-world problems and creating better solutions.
keywords: Real & Virtual World Systems Concept Designs

contact.title: KhanConcepts - Contact
contact.description: Start a Concept Discussion with KhanConcepts to explore innovative Concept Designs, share your business challenges, and discover better solutions together.

navigation._section: Labels for the navigation elements that appear identically on every page: the bottom pill nav, the desktop-only left sidebar on the homepage, and the generic 'Back' button used on the Concepts and Contact pages.

preloader._section: Preloader — the loading screen shown once before the site reveals. 'conceptLabel' is the small label under the logo. 'taglineLine1'/'taglineLine2' are the two lines below that (wrap a word in ** to make it gold, same as everywhere else). 'loadingLabel' is the small word next to the loading percentage.

hero._section: Homepage — Hero (the very first section visitors see, with the big logo).
hero.tagline: Discovering **Real-World Problems** and Creating **Innovative Concept Designs** That Help Companies Create **Better Solutions**

what-is-khanconcepts._section: Homepage — 'What Is KhanConcepts?' (second section, directly below the Hero).
what-is-khanconcepts.paragraph1: KhanConcepts **researches real-world problems** and creates **innovative Concept Designs** that help companies discover **better solutions** before **investing time** and resources in **bringing them to life**

concept-design-innovation._section: Homepage — 'Concept Innovation Space' (third section, below What Is KhanConcepts?).
concept-design-innovation.intro: Explore **innovative Concept Designs** across multiple **industries**, each focused on researching **real-world problems** and creating **better solutions**

concept-to-solution-process._section: Homepage — 'Concept to Solution Process' (fourth section, below Concept Innovation Space) — a vertical 4-step timeline. Each step's 'icon' must be one of: search, chat, document, handshake.

steps.title: Explore Concepts
steps.description: Browse Concept Designs across multiple industries and discover the ones that align with your company's goals and interests.

steps.title: Concept Discussion
steps.description: Schedule a Concept Discussion to explore the Concept Design, discuss your company's goals, challenges, and requirements, and determine whether it's the right fit.

steps.title: Detailed Concept Design
steps.description: Once you decide to move forward, KhanConcepts creates a Detailed Concept Design tailored to your company's goals and requirements.

steps.title: Partnership
steps.description: Continue working with KhanConcepts as your Concept Design becomes a real-world solution.

featured-concepts._section: Homepage — 'Featured Concepts' (fifth section, below Concept Innovation Space — a rotating carousel). The heading is just 'Featured Concepts' itself, split white/gold. This section no longer has its own list of concepts — the cards shown here are pulled automatically from 'concepts-page.items', specifically whichever ones have 'featuredConcept' set to true. To feature a concept here, go set 'featuredConcept: true' on that concept in 'concepts-page.items' instead of editing anything in this section. 'newBadgeLabel'/'improvedBadgeLabel' are the small badge text shown on a card's image depending on that concept's 'status'.

footer._section: Homepage — Footer (final section, at the very bottom of the page). The social icons shown here come from 'seo.social' above (the one place to update social links — see the 'seo' section's note) — not from this section.

contact-page._section: Contact Page (the /contact route, opened from the bottom nav's 'Contact' button)
contact-page.headingWhite: Every Great Collaboration Starts With A
contact-page.paragraph1: Tell us about your company, your goals, the Concept Design you'd like to discuss, and any additional information that may help us prepare for the discussion.

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Chat with us instantly on WhatsApp

form.detailsPlaceholder: Tell us about your company, your goals, the Concept Design you'd like to discuss, and anything you'd like us to know before the discussion.
form.successMessage: You will get the response from KhanConcepts Asap!

concepts-page._section: All Concepts page (/concepts) and every individual concept's detail page (/concepts/<name>) — the page heading, the full Industry and Concept Type filter lists, and the master list of every concept card/detail page. 'industry' (this list) and 'conceptTypes' are the filter taxonomy — every concept's 'industry'/'conceptType' value must exactly match one entry from these two lists. Each entry in 'items' is one concept: 'conceptName' is its title, 'conceptStatus' must be either "new" or "improved", 'conceptTagLine' is the short tagline shown under its name, 'image' is the file path to its picture, 'overview' is 2-3 paragraphs shown on its detail page. 'conceptVideoLink' is shown on the Concept Presentation section of the detail page — paste any regular YouTube or Vimeo link, or a direct hosted video file (.mp4 etc.); leave empty to show a placeholder. 'embedPresentationLink' is shown above the video — paste any regular Google Slides, Google Drive, or Canva share link (just the normal link you'd copy to share it, not a special embed code); leave empty to show a placeholder. 'showPresentation' controls whether the Concept Presentation section (slide deck) shows on that concept's detail page — defaults to true. 'showVideo' controls whether the separate Video section shows — defaults to false; set it to true once a concept has a real video to show. 'featuredConcept' controls whether this concept also shows as a card in the homepage's 'Featured Concepts' carousel — set it to true to feature it there. 'exploreConceptLabel' through 'loadingMoreLabel' are the filter-panel and card labels on the All Concepts listing page — 'newConceptBadgeLabel'/'improvedConceptBadgeLabel' are specifically the small badge shown on each card's thumbnail image. 'detail' holds every label/message on an individual concept's detail page — the share menu, the Concept Status/Industry/Concept Type field labels and their New/Improved values, the video/slide placeholder messages, the not-found message, and the bottom call-to-action block.

detail.ctaParagraph: Schedule a Concept Discussion to explore how this Concept Design can be tailored to your company's goals and requirements.

items.description: An AI-orchestrated smart city framework that unifies infrastructure, mobility, energy, and governance into a single adaptive system built for sustainable urban growth.
overview: NeoMetropolis AI City is a civilization-scale urban operating system that coordinates transportation, energy, housing, and public services through one adaptive AI layer.

By modeling the city as a living system, the platform continuously rebalances resources — routing traffic, distributing power, and allocating services — in response to real-time demand instead of static planning.
The framework scales from a single smart district to an entire metropolitan region, giving city planners a foundation for resilient, sustainable growth.

not-found-page._section: The 404 page shown for any URL that doesn't match a real page on the site.
not-found-page.title: Page Not Found
not-found-page.heading: This Page Doesn't Exist
not-found-page.message: The page you're looking for may have been moved or no longer exists. Head back home or explore our Concept Designs.
